## Domain
e.g., Backend Engineering, Machine Learning, Product Strategy

## Frameworks Used

## Checklist
- [ ] All 7 phases are present
- [ ] Hidden assumptions use 🟢🟡🔴 risk levels
- [ ] At least 2 alternative paths in Phase 4
- [ ] Confidence score is honest
- [ ] Code examples (if any) are runnable
